# The Playbook

> Engineering principles for teams that ship

Five chapters on engineering culture, design principles, and development workflows. About thirty minutes cover to cover.

## Chapters

- [The Preamble](https://playbook.1mb.dev/preamble): How we think together. Five principles for collaboration where the best ideas win regardless of source.
- [Design Rules](https://playbook.1mb.dev/design-rules): What we build toward. Eighteen rules across four clusters: clarity, simplicity, resilience, extensibility.
- [The Ritual](https://playbook.1mb.dev/ritual): How we work. The daily cycle of scoping, building, and shipping with confidence.
- [The Review](https://playbook.1mb.dev/review): How we maintain quality. A review culture built on specialized perspectives and honest feedback.
- [Adoption](https://playbook.1mb.dev/adoption): How to start. Practical steps for individuals, teams, and organizations.

## Full Command Reference

- [107 Commands across 9 Categories](https://vnykmshr.github.io/playbook/): The complete reference for every playbook command.

## About

Open source under MIT License. Source at https://github.com/vnykmshr/playbook
